positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a whimsical forest scene at dusk. The composition features a central grouping of towering, bioluminescent mushrooms and delicate, winding roots that form natural arches. Incorporate clean, strong silhouettes of stylized deer and woodland creatures nestled amongst the flora. Use a deep indigo and emerald palette with pops of luminous cyan and soft gold, emphasizing high contrast and clean edges suitable for screen printing. The style should be a blend of Art Deco fantasy and modern graphic design, vector-like, with perfect symmetry and dynamic negative space.
negative: artifacts, noise, blur, text, logo, watermark, signature, low quality, messy lines, poor anatomy, bad hands, extra limbs, grayscale, photorealism, cluttered background
